query: SELECT COUNT(*) as total, SUM(IF(address IS NOT NULL AND address != '', 1, 0)) as with_address, SUM(IF(phone IS NOT NULL AND phone != '', 1, 0)) as with_phone FROM contact_cache WHERE tenantId = 960028;
